purpose: Network-free, deterministic notice evidence for the exact pinned globe.gl composite bundle. This artifact records evidence only and grants no rights or release authority.

source_inventory.verification_method: Every third-party sourcesContent entry was byte-compared with the corresponding exact-version npm tarball path.

notice_file.normalization: CRLF to LF; exactly one final LF per payload

source_version_evidence.h3_js_changelog_statement: Updated the core library to v4.4.1

notice_sections.title: Helvetiker / MAGENTA MgOpen font licence file
musl copyright corpus shipped with Emscripten 1.38.43

counsel_questions: Does the unmodified Helvetiker JSON satisfy the MAGENTA/MgOpen notice, naming, modification and no-standalone-sale conditions when distributed inside the site bundle?
Is Unlicense acceptable in every jurisdiction in which the foundation distributes the site, including jurisdictions that may not recognize public-domain dedication?
Does including the complete Emscripten 1.38.43 and musl notice corpora fully satisfy any obligations arising from generated or linked runtime code inside h3-js?
Does the H3 treatment require any notice beyond the full Apache-2.0 licence, H3 NOTICE, and DGGRID attribution recorded here?
